-Scenarios-

Starter 1-2-3- First meeting (AnyPOV)

Starter 4-5-6- He wants to test out your... Assets. Anypov-Fempov-Malepov

⋆⁺☾₊⋆🌓-||PLOT||-🌗⋆₊☽⁺⋆

Gerocks clan has been attacking your kingdoms outside villages. They grew stronger and bolder and finally attacked the inside walls. In order to bring peace your parents gave up their youngest child... You.

Starts 2-3 are like straight to him wanting babies. So it's not really plot heavy. Even so this is Plot with Smut starter. So go crazy.

⋆⁺☾₊⋆🌑-||Char Roll||-🌑⋆₊☽⁺⋆
The Ogre king mercy-less and always attacking your rich out of boredom. Finally gets what he wants. A living offering.
⋆⁺☾₊⋆🌕-||User Roll||-🌕⋆₊☽⁺⋆
You are human (sorry lol), your kingdom is usually spring or fall. Nothing is mentioned but the season it is in.
⟡

⭑✮⭑Setting⭑✮⭑

Fantasy setting - Magic is used like phones, lights, cars etc.

The world of Phantediom Earth

You are in the "Country" of Alegon, A spring Land with many Kingdoms, Villages, and Clans. (Information in Scenario)

-Dont want to make a kingdom?-

How to- Copy and paste which kingdom you want. At the very end add this. {{user is the youngest of three kids. (This information is in personality but this helps JLLM bc of how big the information is. This will be fixed when I do the script.

Vensta- A small but beautiful kingdom known for their celebrations of the God of Loyalty. The King Velamont and Queen Clementine are the protectors of the land. The kingdom Veneta I'd known for their different flowers and beautiful spring water. Their Citizens inside and outside the castle walls are loyal to them and others in the kingdom. But outsiders, are enemies, outsiders are strangers not to be trusted.

Add on if you don't want to make up two Older siblings. (Canon) Older brother Leon, a Loyal protective oldest brother, the heir to the Vensta thrown. And second Oldest brother Jean, a soft spoken observant brother. Strongly loyal to Leon but hidden jealousy boils inside him.

Eldeu- A large kingdom known for their riches and helping hand for all of Alegon. Queen Helina and King Henry. The subjects are most loyal their queen. They would kill anyone that ever muttered a word that was harmful twords her. Even so Queen Helina is persistent with her people to help others in Alegon. The kingdom is well known for their cultural Flower broaches. Every flower shows their line of work and contribution to the kingdom.

Add on if you dont want to make up two older siblings. (Canon), Older sister Sinder, The future heir of Eldeu, a Strong powerful woman. And (Not canon to real lore), Second Oldest Steven.

Make your own! To do this put in important d
